node.statement: WP2: Formalise the finite skeletal fusion-data and finite-dimensional linear algebra foundation in Lean (scope: `Formalisation/Foundations/` + `Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/`, plus the Fibonacci/Ising instances under `Formalisation/{Fibonacci, Ising}/`), with Julia and WolframScript checks for the algebraic claims (one each per Lean module per `results/CHECKS.md`). This WP realises the finite coordinate skeleton underlying [[def:fuscat]] and [[def:Q]] in `summary.tex` §3, after sector bases are chosen.
